channel.title: Teaching-Guides-Prototype-Gens on Teaching History
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching-Guides-Prototype-Gens on Teaching History

item.title: Visiting History: A Professional Development Guide
item.description: How do you make the world a classroom for teachers? How do you create good professional development in the field? Learn strategies for creating quality professional development experiences using the museums, historic sites, archives, and cultural institutions in your own backyard or across the country.
